page_content:
Total Credits

21

1 Starting in Fall 2013 one 4xx-level elective is required for completion of

the minor in French studies.

All courses must be in French.

A maximum of six (6) credits can be applied to the minor from

courses taken at other institutions, with the exception of Maryland in Nice, which allows the transfer of nine (9) credits.

All courses presented for the minor must be passed with a grade of
